prompt: 我想五一假期（5月1日-5月3日）和女朋友去杭州玩3天，预算5000元，我们从上海出发，喜欢吃本帮菜和杭帮菜

assertions.notes: 五一触发国内 peak period — dining calendar check required; pre-trip recheck block optional for planning-only.

prompt: 我有一份去大阪5天的零散旅行笔记（含酒店预订截图、餐厅清单、景点收藏），帮我整理成一份完整的行程指南页面

must_have_section: pre-trip recheck block or justification if not peak

prompt: 下个月想出去玩几天，有什么建议？

must_not_contain: specific hotel name without user destination

prompt: 我下周去成都3天，想带点当地特产和手信回来送朋友，有什么推荐？顺便帮我规划下行程

specialty_card_fields_per_item: transport notes (liquid limit / fragility / shelf life)

prompt: 春节想带家人去东京玩5天，预算2万，从北京出发，帮我做个完整攻略

must_have_section: specialty cards with Japan customs + airline liquid flags
must_trigger_parallel_verification: trip-prep (single country ≥2 — not applicable here; single country OK)

prompt: 黄金周（5月1日-5月6日）两个人去东京6天，预算5万元，爱吃日料，帮我做行程，重点是每天的午晚餐

assertions.must_include_status_line: Dispatched N sub-agents for venue verification
assertions.ward_consistency_check: restaurant name district must match official address district
must_have_section: pre-trip recheck block (3–5 days before departure)

prompt: 圣诞节期间（12月22日-12月28日）和老婆去罗马7天，预算每人 15000 元人民币（机票之外），想吃地道的意面、披萨、海鲜，帮我做完整行程

assertions.ward_consistency_check: restaurant name district (Trastevere / Monti / Testaccio) must match via address
per_restaurant_card_required_fields: walking minutes from hotel or anchor
per-person price band (EUR, Value/Mid/High calibrated to Rome)
must_have_section: pre-trip recheck block listing Natale/Santo Stefano special hours + Dec 24 reservation status

prompt: 我看了一下你推荐的 Day 3 晚餐「こんぶや 恵比寿」，好像永久停业了，请换一家，并检查其他日子的餐厅有没有类似问题
6月下旬从成都出发自驾川西小环线 5 天，带父母，帮我规划

assertions.driving_licence_rule: domestic Chinese licence applies directly — MUST NOT trigger IDP or JAF translation rule

prompt: 9月中旬从雷克雅未克出发自驾冰岛环岛 8 天，夫妻两人，帮我做完整攻略
10月想和老婆去巴厘岛玩7天，我们既想体验潜水冲浪火山徒步这种冒险活动，也想有spa泡汤懒躺海边这种放松度假，预算3万

must_have_trip_prep: etiquette (Hindu temple dress, left-hand taboo, PDA limits)

must_have_safety_block.consulate: Chinese Consulate Denpasar with after-hours line
must_have_safety_block.ocean_risk_phrasing: Aug–Oct west coast swell; midday Padang Padang high-tide hazard; dive only with PADI 5-star operators

prompt: 明年春节（2月10日-2月22日）全家四口（父母+我+我老婆）去日韩泰三国串联：东京4天+首尔4天+曼谷4天，从北京出发，预算8万元，爸爸有高血压在吃药

assertions.must_trigger_budget_overage_check: 8万 for 4 pax across 3 countries — likely >15% over; confirm

chronic_medication_legality_per_country.Japan: hypertension meds OK; verify exact drug

prompt: 3月下旬（斋月期间）带 8 岁女儿去迪拜 5 天玩，预算 4 万，想看哈利法塔 + 沙漠越野 + 购物

must_have_etiquette_items: no daytime eating/drinking/smoking in public (including water)
modest dress (shoulders + knees covered for women)
Iftar sunset window — restaurant queues; book ahead
itinerary_adaptation: Burj Khalifa moved to evening (sunset/night, avoid midday + clash with Iftar)
no long daytime outdoor activity with child in 40°C+
assertions.tour_operator_vetting_source: DTCM / visitdubai.com certified list — NOT generic TripAdvisor floor

safety_block_required.consulate_phone_rule: if exact number unverifiable — leave phone blank + '→ Fetch from http://dubai.china-consulate.gov.cn/' per §3 partial-number ban

minor_entry_documents: mother consent letter if single-parent accompanying

prompt: 下周末和闺蜜去京都3天2晚，预算3000元住宿，想住祇園或河原町附近，最好能步行到花见小路和鸭川，有推荐的酒店吗？

must_have_hotel_card_fields: name and tier (mass-market / recommended / niche / avoid)
transit convenience (minutes to station + key attractions)
nightly rate range (JPY, with source + research date)
assertions.must_cross_reference_sources: ≥2 independent sources (e.g., Booking.com + TripAdvisor, or Trip.com + Google Maps)
assertions.must_include_check_in_out: standard times + luggage storage note for early arrival or late departure
assertions.must_state_currency: JPY for rates, CNY for budget comparison
assertions.proximity_constraint_respected: walking distance to 花見小路 + 鴨川 stated per hotel

prompt: 端午节想带3岁女儿去海边玩几天，从深圳出发，自驾3小时内，有什么推荐？

must_not_contain: specific hotel name from training data
specific restaurant name from training data
specific dish name from training data

prompt: 就去海陵岛吧，有什么亲子酒店推荐？要有儿童池，离海滩近

progressive_search_phase1.platform: 携程 or 飞猪 (domestic China)

timeout_degradation_triggers: 3 consecutive WebFetch failures → search advisory card
single hotel search > 3 min → search advisory card
all Phase 1 candidates fail → full category search advisory
search_advisory_card_fields_if_degraded: keywords (海陵岛 + 亲子 + 儿童池)
must_never: output hotel names from training data without web evidence

prompt: 我朋友推荐了海陵岛的敏捷黄金海岸酒店，帮我看看这家怎么样，适合带小孩去吗？

must_attempt_web_verification: does the hotel exist and is it open

if_verification_succeeds.output: hotel card with verified data per hotel-selection.md

if_verification_fails.output: explicit statement that verification failed + search advisory card for alternatives
if_verification_fails.must_not: embellish user-supplied name with unverified details (fake ratings, invented prices, fabricated facilities)

prompt: 就去顺德吧，帮我推荐 Day1 午餐的顺德菜餐厅。（模拟：大众点评搜索页 302 跳登录、高德地图返回需登录的空白页）

must_retry_before_degrading.rationale: a login wall blocks the platform's own page, not the aggregator-indexed copy

must_not: output a search advisory card after only Dianping + Amap login walls
treat two login-walled platforms as 'all verification attempts failed'
output restaurant names from training data without aggregator-sourced evidence
tell the user to just search it themselves without first attempting the aggregator

if_aggregator_surfaces_verifiable_data.output: verified restaurant card(s) with cuisine · rating · walk time · price band per dining-rules.md §5
if_aggregator_surfaces_verifiable_data.must_cite_source: underlying platform via aggregator, e.g. 大众点评 4.5（经 DuckDuckGo 聚合, date）

if_aggregator_retry_also_fails.output: search advisory card as LAST RESORT
if_aggregator_retry_also_fails.must_state: which channels were tried and why each failed

prompt: 10 月底和老婆去阿根廷玩 10 天（布宜诺斯艾利斯 + 门多萨 + 巴塔哥尼亚 El Calafate），从北京出发，总预算 5 万人民币（不含国际机票），我们预算比较紧

assertions.must_declare_region_band_fit: South America not listed directly — must pick closest band (mainland China + SEA cities or South / SE Asia) and state the approximation explicitly, not silently
must_surface_hidden_costs: foreign-transaction fee impact on card spend
Argentina FX rate picture (official vs blue vs dólar tarjeta vs MEP)
capital controls — USD cash import limits
self-drive day costs if any Patagonia driving segment

refundable_decision_stated.lodging: at least arrival-day refundable given 30+ hour travel time from Beijing + potential delay
refundable_decision_stated.trigger_invoked: narrow connection buffer (BJS → Argentina typically 2 legs ≥ 30h total)

fx_timing_rule.primary_guidance: bring USD cash — do not convert CNY → ARS in advance
fx_timing_rule.rationale_cited: Argentina blue / MEP / official rate divergence 30-80% per trip-prep.md §3
fx_timing_rule.rate_assumption_line_required: output must state assumed USD→ARS rate + research date + FX buffer location

must_cite_source_for: every intercity flight / long-distance bus fare
must_not_recommend_product_by_name: specific travel card / FX app by product name without 'verify current terms'

prompt: 去东京旅行，帮我推荐惠比寿（恵比寿）附近 Day2 晚餐的一家居酒屋。（模拟：Tabelog 餐厅页 302 跳登录、Google Maps 返回需同意 cookie 的空白页）

assertions.applies_to_international_platforms: Tabelog + Google Maps consent/login walls are NOT 'no data' — same failure-mode rule as China platforms

must_retry_before_degrading.rationale: the canonical channel order in travel-sources.md §Login-Wall Fallback applies regardless of platform brand

case_A_authoritative_page_served.rule: if anonymous fetch of Tabelog (the authoritative Tokyo dining platform) actually returns name + rating + price + ward, that IS §2 verification — cite normally, NO snippet qualifier, do NOT run the weaker aggregator bar
case_A_authoritative_page_served.rationale: the login-wall apparatus is a fallback, not the default — Tabelog list pages routinely serve anonymous data

all_must_hold: name + rating corroborated by EITHER one authoritative-sourced snippet (DDG/Bing result carrying the Tabelog name+score) OR ≥2 independent aggregator hits on same name+address — a single generic snippet is candidacy only
recent activity (current-year reviews or current price)
no closure / relocation language in any reachable snippet (閉店 / 移転 / permanently closed); flag residual uncertainty if the live Maps banner was unreachable
name + district (恵比寿) match the address — §4 ward consistency
case_B_authoritative_walled_snippet_bar.if_bar_met: output the izakaya card WITH the visible tier qualifier （经聚合器快照核实，非活页 / verified via aggregator snippet, not live page）
case_B_authoritative_walled_snippet_bar.if_bar_not_met: candidacy only — not a main pick — degrade to search advisory card per knowledge-layers.md §5

per_restaurant_card_required_fields: walking minutes from 恵比寿 station
must_not: treat Tabelog 302 + Google Maps consent wall as 'all verification attempts failed'
output an izakaya name from training data without aggregator-sourced evidence
present a snippet-cleared restaurant as live-page verified (must carry the snippet-tier qualifier)
output a single-aggregator name as a confirmed main pick

prompt: 五一假期带 6 岁儿子从上海去台湾环岛 8 天，3 人，预算人民币 3 万，喜欢夜市和温泉。帮我规划行前准备。

must_name_permits: 大陆居民往来台湾通行证
assertions.must_verify_or_flag: individual-travel (自由行) eligibility depends on origin city in pilot scheme; otherwise group-tour channel — verify, do not assume
assertions.fallback_on_unverifiable_processing: state as unverified estimate + point to issuing-authority official site; never present an unverified number as fact

prompt: 带 5 岁女儿去日本箱根泡温泉，住温泉旅馆两晚，帮我注意安全。

must_have_thermal_safety_items: exit at first flushing or dizziness
surface the facility's posted age-floor / time-limit
assertions.must_not_contain_fabricated_pediatric_th: do NOT state a specific pediatric water temperature or minute limit as fact (e.g. invented '≤39°C' / '≤10 min' for children); direct to the facility's posted limit instead
assertions.trigger_is_itinerary_content_not_theme: fires because an onsen appears in the itinerary, even though 'wellness' was not the stated theme

prompt: 9 月去台湾花莲太鲁阁徒步两天，帮我规划，注意 2024 地震后的状况。

assertions.must_name_authority_source_class: national-park authority / government tourism board / road-status (NOT venue operating-status, which is for restaurants/shops)
assertions.recheck_cadence: 3-5 days before departure, folded into the existing pre-trip recheck block (one block, not two)
assertions.must_not_duplicate_weather_recheck: the hazard-forecast/AQI recheck lives in weather-and-output §1 (1-2 weeks out); this rule is closure-status only
assertions.fallback_on_unconfirmable_status: if authority page walled/404/contradictory → exhaustion gate; if still unconfirmable, output a pre-departure to-do WITH the official URL — never infer open/all-clear

prompt: 五一黄金周带 6 岁儿子去台湾环岛 10 天（5月1日-5月10日），从上海出发，3 人（我+老婆+娃），预算人民币 3 万，喜欢夜市、温泉、海景，不想太累。

assertions._note: integration case — the original Taiwan-Golden-Week dry-run brief. Exercises all three v0.13.0 fixes together plus pre-existing peak-recheck.
must_name_permits: 大陆居民往来台湾通行证
assertions.must_fire_peak_recheck_block: May Day (五一) is a China travel peak — pre-trip recheck block required per dining-rules §8
assertions.disaster_recheck_if_taroko_in_itinerary: if an itinerary touches Taroko/east-coast post-quake zone, fold closure-status recheck into the same block

prompt: 去东京旅行，帮我推荐惠比寿（恵比寿）附近 Day2 晚餐的一家寿司店，并推荐一家新宿性价比酒店。（模拟：静态抓取下 Google Maps 只回页面框架/无餐厅数据、Booking 结果页空白；但本环境具备会执行 JS 的无头浏览器 + 抗指纹渲染能力）

assertions.static_blank_is_not_failure: a static (no-JS) fetch returning Maps chrome / blank Booking is a rung to climb, NOT a verification failure or 'no data'
js_render_recovers_for_dining: operating-status / 'Permanently closed' banner (the §2 signal unreachable to static fetch)
fingerprint_resistant_render_recovers_fo: nightly price (the field a static fetch leaves blank)
assertions.live_page_from_render_rung_is_case_A: a live authoritative page recovered by the JS-render or fingerprint-resistant rung IS §2 verification — cite normally, NO snippet qualifier, do NOT run the weaker aggregator snippet bar
assertions.capability_tiered_not_tool_named: rules describe capabilities (JS-rendering / fingerprint-resistant render), not a specific tool; an environment missing a rung skips to the next and may legitimately land in Case B
must_not: treat a static-fetch Maps chrome / blank Booking as 'all verification attempts failed'
read the absence of a 'Permanently closed' banner from a failed static fetch as 'open'
degrade to a search advisory card before climbing the available render rungs
apply the snippet-tier qualifier to a live page recovered by a render rung

prompt: 下个月去顺德玩2晚，想住五星级酒店，预算每晚600元，有什么推荐？我比较在意房间和装修是不是够新。

assertions.must_capture_hardware_preference: intake asks modern-hardware-preferred / heritage-OK / no-preference before ranking hotels (user already signalled modern)
assertions.must_surface_hardware_signal_per_hotel: every hotel card carries a hardware-freshness read: Tier-1 opened/renovated year if known, else Tier-2 recent-review hardware sentiment, else 未能核实
assertions.must_recency_weight_reviews: a hotel with a high lifetime score but a negative last-12-month hardware trend is flagged, not promoted on the aggregate
assertions.must_have_hardware_card_field: each hotel card and the comparison table expose the Hardware field; the scout card includes opened/renovated year when the listing shows it
must_not: promote a hotel to silent first pick on star-class + lifetime rating alone
invent an opening or renovation year
auto-mark a hotel 'avoid' on the recent-review hardware proxy alone
rule_refs: travel-sources.md §Reading OTA Listings for Hardware Condition
